metadata.description: Build CLIs worth running every morning. A UX design system for the terminal — plan the experience, scaffold exactly what you planned, improve it session by session. For designers, engineers, and founders who want great terminal tools without one-size-fits-all code generation.

plugins.name: cli
plugins.description: Five skills for designing, scaffolding, auditing, and improving terminal tools. Treats the CLI as a design surface — not just a script runner.

skills.description: Full build cycle: plan the UX, scaffold exactly what the plan says, review, verify, ship. The entry point for new CLIs.
Plan before you build. 5-step interview → CONTEXT.md, DECISIONS.md, PLAN.md in .cli/plan/. Use this when you want to think before touching code.
Understand what's already there. Read-only analysis: architecture map, convention gaps, the 5 files to read before making any changes.
Improve what exists. Loads all context first, then fixes, extends, or audits — one task at a time with commits.
Turn session history into project memory. Gets smarter the more you use it — patterns, gotchas, decisions already made.
